title: French Baguette with Garlic and Syrian Olives
description: A classic French baguette recipe topped with garlic and delicious Syrian olives. This savory dish is perfect for a quick meal or snack.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the dense flour, salt, and bake yeast.
2. Gradually add in the water and mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough and shape into a long, thin baguette.
7. Place the baguette on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Brush the top of the baguette with olive oil and sprinkle with minced garlic.
9. Bake the baguette in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Remove the baguette from the oven and top with sliced Syrian olives.
